package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_cut: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.SplitAfterN(..., 2)[0]` instead of a two-part `bytes.Cut(...)` flow.
type CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutModel
}

type CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCut(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesSplitafternTwoIndexZeroCutDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_cut"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    _ = bytes.SplitAfterN(buf, []byte(":"), 2)[0]
    bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "splitaftern": 2, "two": 3, "index": 4, "zero": 5, "cut": 6}
    bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_positive_0
    splitaftern_positive_1 := bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive["splitaftern"] + len(input)
    _ = splitaftern_positive_1
    two_positive_2 := bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive["two"] + len(input)
    _ = two_positive_2
    index_positive_3 := bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive["index"] + len(input)
    _ = index_positive_3
    zero_positive_4 := bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive["zero"] + len(input)
    _ = zero_positive_4
    cut_positive_5 := bytes_splitaftern_two_index_zero_positive["cut"] + len(input)
    _ = cut_positive_5
    return nil
}
